AA.name: Attachment Anxiety
AA.description: Tendency to worry about relationship security and seek reassurance

AV.name: Attachment Avoidance
AV.description: Tendency to distance from intimacy and emotional vulnerability

ER.name: Emotional Regulation
ER.description: Ability to manage emotions without being overwhelmed

RS.name: Responsiveness
RS.description: Willingness to meet partner's emotional needs

ER2.name: Emotional Responsibility
ER2.description: Tendency to own reactions rather than blame partner

CR.name: Conflict Repair Ability
CR.description: Ability to resolve tension and reconnect after conflict

NC.name: Negative Conflict Style
NC.description: Tendency toward criticism, defensiveness, or escalation

CA.name: Closeness–Autonomy Preference
CA.description: Balance between desire for togetherness and independence

CT.name: Closeness Tolerance
CT.description: Ability to sustain intimacy without becoming overwhelmed

CD.name: Communication Directness
CD.description: Tendency to express concerns clearly and directly

MR.name: Mind-Reading Expectation
MR.description: Expectation that partner should understand needs without explanation

JS.name: Jealousy / Threat Sensitivity
JS.description: Tendency to feel threatened by ambiguous partner behavior

EN.name: Effort & Investment Norms
EN.description: Expectations about consistent effort and reliability in relationship

LT.name: Long-Term Orientation
LT.description: Focus on building lasting, committed relationships

LS.name: Life Structure Alignment
LS.description: Clarity and alignment on major life decisions (kids, location, values)

NS.name: Novelty vs Stability Preference
NS.description: Preference for predictability vs constant change and stimulation

ES.name: Emotional Stability
ES.description: Overall mood stability and resilience to stress

AG.name: Assertiveness–Agreeableness Balance
AG.description: Balance between standing up for needs and maintaining harmony
